summary: W555では、strict short exact complexからWalkingParallelPair limitのalgebraic exactnessを直接証明した。zero成分の代数的持ち上げ、one成分のclosed embeddingによる単射性、cone naturality、MetrizableLCAの明示的equalizer limitを組み合わせ、さらにzero projectionのclosed embeddingで持ち上げた元が元のx₂に一致することを示した。これによりWPP limit closureのleft closed embeddingとalgebraic exactnessは直接証明済みになった。一方で、right open、right surjective、W515/W516/W517 relation data、W527 row providers、normalized representative dataとuniq、triangulated data、bounded left calculus instanceはまだ未構成なのでproduct_successではない。

git_commit: external: use git rev-parse HEAD after checkout; enclosing commit hash is not embedded to avoid self-reference
worker_frontier_summary: W555 closes direct WPP limit algebraic exactness. The nonterminal work is now concentrated in right-open/right-surjectivity for the WPP limit route or the W515/W527 provider route.
claim_review_result: not_product_success; W555 closes the WPP limit algebraic exactness field but leaves right-open/right-surjectivity and provider data unconstructed.
remaining_gaps: WPP limit right open-map direct certificate
triangulated data and bounded left-calculus instance
next_recommended_goal: Attack WPP limit right-open/right-surjectivity with explicit equalizer data and strict lifting; if under-hypothesized, pivot to W515/W527 provider construction.
remaining_work: Prove or supply right-open and right-surjective WPP limit certificates, or pivot to the W515/W527 provider route if these are under-hypothesized.

Construct coherent normalized representative/uniqueness and final triangulated/bounded-left-calculus data.
